description: Canary baseline: projects route 9.8MB/137 modules; non-work routes /msp/inventory, /msp/settings, /msp/billing floor recorded (current cross-feature module counts captured)
QuickCreateDialog.tsx no longer statically imports QuickAddClient/Contact/Asset/ProjectQuickAdd/QuickAddService/QuickAddProduct (grep + typecheck green)
Each intercepted create-<x> route resolves and its @modal slot renders the dialog; the existing create-ticket path still works unchanged
Canary after intercept: assets/clients/projects/billing quick-add component graphs absent from the shell/header chunk (present only under their create-<x> route)
Phase 1 gates: typecheck exit 0; ESLint guard 0; no new import('@alga-psa/ in shell; all 6 dialogs open+submit; project/user-activities pages still load

Work-set grep is exhaustive: every file calling useDrawer/openDrawer/replaceDrawer and every cross-feature use* hook is traced to a /msp route and classified; no route with drawer usage lands in the non-work list
Work vs non-work lists recorded with measured non-work floor; the user's OOM-trigger routes (inventory/billing/settings) are correctly classified
WorkspaceProviders renders the exact same provider nesting + DrawerOutlet as DefaultLayout 461-472/575 did (structural equivalence — a work route wrapped in it resolves every cross-feature context)
DrawerProvider state placement decided (OQ1): a surviving chrome trigger (if any) can still open a drawer; if none, state moving into WorkspaceProviders is confirmed safe

SPIKE: the chosen mount mechanism coexists with the @modal parallel slot + create-<x> intercepting routes (create-ticket modal still intercepts from a work route; no route-group/parallel-route breakage)
Every work route is wrapped by WorkspaceProviders (a cross-feature hook consumer on each work route resolves context; SSR of each work route succeeds)

CROSS-FEATURE DRAWER NAV intact: on a work route, open ticket drawer → replaceDrawer to client → openDrawer interaction → goBack/forward through the stack + drawer.historyBack shortcut, all with intact context
DefaultLayout no longer imports/renders the cross-feature provider stack or DrawerOutlet (grep + typecheck); only justified globals remain
Canary: /msp/inventory and /msp/settings pull ZERO tickets/projects/scheduling/clients/user-activities cross-feature modules; their partial size drops materially vs T001 baseline
No non-work route has a broken drawer trigger (runtime smoke a sample of non-work routes: no openDrawer-with-no-outlet dead-ends)

Settings user management and service-request definition editor drawer triggers work with local lightweight drawer handling after the shell DrawerOutlet is removed; neither route imports WorkspaceProviders
Final canary: non-work routes floor-free; work routes unchanged; >=15 mixed routes compile with NO Zone-Allocation OOM; Results table filled

Final gates: full typecheck exit 0; ESLint barrel guard 0; rg finds zero dynamic import('@alga-psa/ in shell/layouts/msp-composition; packageDependencies.test.ts passes; touched-package unit tests pass

Final runtime smoke matrix: full cross-feature drawer navigation works on work routes (ticket↔client↔interaction↔project chains with back/forward); non-work routes render chrome only, no drawer regressions
